scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: CNV calling from WGS read depth is a standard approach; placeholder warning is prominently disclosed; no fabricated scientific claims.

code_usability.detail: Script compiles; placeholder warning is prominent in SKILL.md header; mock data is clearly labeled; no runnable scientific code to fail.

functional_suitability.note: SKILL.md fully specifies CNV calling workflow, BED export, tumor-normal comparison, and plot formats. Placeholder warning prominently disclosed. Script still returns hardcoded mock data.

reliability.note: BAM index error handling documented; HIPAA enforcement documented; --confirm-hipaa flag in argparse but not enforced at runtime; placeholder limitation persists.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 185 lines — comprehensive; bin size table and coverage requirements documented.

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear; fallback template present; HIPAA enforcement documented; placeholder warning in header; Output Requirements section explicit.

human_usability.note: Placeholder warning is prominent and honest; scope boundary clear; Common Pitfalls section is excellent.

security.note: HIPAA enforcement documented; --confirm-hipaa flag present in argparse; no credential concerns; no injection vectors. Minor: flag not enforced at runtime.

maintainability.note: Script structure is clean with CNVCaller class; BED export isolated; placeholder is clearly marked for replacement.

agent_specific.note: Trigger description precise; HIPAA enforcement documented; placeholder warning present; composability limited by mock data. Deduction: --confirm-hipaa not enforced at runtime; plot_genome_wide() does not produce a real file.

key_strengths: Placeholder warning prominently disclosed in SKILL.md header and Output Requirements — honest and visible before any use
HIPAA enforcement via --confirm-hipaa flag documented and present in argparse; PHI Warning includes anonymization recommendation
Error handling for missing BAM index is excellent with actionable samtools index command
Tumor-normal limitation explicitly documented in Section 4 with clear warning not to use for somatic CNV identification
Common Pitfalls section covers low coverage, reference mismatch, tumor purity, and CNV filtering — excellent guidance

recommendations.title: Placeholder CNV calling returns hardcoded mock data — fourth consecutive round
recommendations.problem: The call_cnvs() method returns hardcoded chr1 and chr7 CNV calls regardless of input BAM file. plot_genome_wide() prints a path string but produces no real file. Four rounds of SKILL.md polish have not addressed the core implementation gap.
recommendations.root_cause: CNV calling algorithm was not implemented; placeholder was left in production code across all four polish cycles.
recommendations.fix: Implement real CNV calling using pysam + numpy for read depth calculation per bin. Implement plot_genome_wide() using matplotlib to render a real genome-wide scatter plot. Until implemented, the skill should remain in Beta/internal use only.

recommendations.title: --confirm-hipaa flag not enforced at runtime despite four rounds of documentation
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents --confirm-hipaa enforcement but the script does not check for this flag before processing. The enforcement is only at the documentation/instruction level.
recommendations.root_cause: Script was not updated to implement the --confirm-hipaa check despite it being documented across four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Add runtime check: if 'patient' in args.input.lower() and not args.confirm_hipaa: print('Patient genomic data detected. Confirm HIPAA compliance with --confirm-hipaa before proceeding.', file=sys.stderr); sys.exit(1).

recommendations.title: plot_genome_wide() does not produce a real output file
recommendations.problem: plot_genome_wide() only prints a path string and returns it; no matplotlib rendering is performed. The plot file path printed to stdout does not exist on disk.
recommendations.root_cause: Placeholder implementation was not updated when the script was partially refactored.
recommendations.fix: Implement plot_genome_wide() using matplotlib: create a figure with chromosome-colored scatter plot of CNV calls, save to output_path/cnv_plot.{fmt} using plt.savefig().
